components.summary: Portable locators are enforced and the current audit has zero action-required entries.
Comparative parity is deep, but foundational closure is still bounded by uncovered surfaces and one unresolved mismatch.
Mismatch, verdict workflow, coverage-gap, and scientific-debt outputs keep failures visible instead of hidden.
Major runtime surfaces still include uncovered alignment and distance families.
Reviewer summaries, docs navigation, and governed index outputs make the current trust surface inspectable.
Workbench refresh, freshness, integrity, and partial rerun support make the evidence-book reproducible as a maintained system.
